Package jline.lang.layerednetworks

Class LayeredNetworkStruct

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.layerednetworks.LayeredNetworkStruct
  • public class LayeredNetworkStruct
extends Object
    Class summarizing the characteristics of a LayeredNetwork
